labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Renzo MCP Server" provides 9 tools focused on cryptocurrency & blockchain tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading. Key tools: get_supported_chains, get_protocol_stats, get_ezeth_info, get_operators, get_vaults.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Cryptocurrency & Blockchain" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: token, blockchain, ethereum.

tools.name: get_supported_chains
tools.description: List all blockchain networks Renzo operates on, including supported products per chain

tools.name: get_protocol_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate Renzo protocol statistics: total TVL, per-ecosystem TVL, APRs, and supported chain count

tools.name: get_ezeth_info
tools.description: Get current ezETH metrics: APR, total supply, TVL, price, and exchange rate

tools.name: get_operators
tools.description: List Renzo protocol operators, optionally filtered by product (ezETH, pzETH, ezSOL, etc.)

tools.name: get_vaults
tools.description: List Renzo vaults with current TVL and APR, optionally filtered by ecosystem (eigenlayer, symbiotic, jito, generic)

tools.name: get_vault_details
tools.description: Get detailed information for a specific Renzo vault, including daily TVL snapshots, operators, and strategy parameters (current LTV, target LTV, max LTV) for reserve vaults. Pass a vault address or symbol (e.g. 'ezREZ', 'ezCompETH1').

tools.name: get_vault_strategy
tools.description: Get the strategy and AVS (Actively Validated Service) allocations for an EigenLayer vault. Shows where the vault's capital is deployed, how much is staked in each AVS, and which operators run the infrastructure. Supports ezETH, ezEIGEN, and ezREZ.

tools.name: get_token_balances
tools.description: Get a user's Renzo token balances on Ethereum mainnet (ezETH, pzETH, vault LP tokens) with ETH and USD values. Pass an Ethereum address.

tools.name: get_withdrawal_requests
tools.description: Get a user's pending ezETH withdrawal requests from the WithdrawQueue contract, including amounts, claimability status, and time remaining. Pass an Ethereum address.
